answers.where: portrait pasture with a choose-upgrade card stack over the frozen game field
answers.action: tap one large upgrade card to choose the next power
answers.response: the card choice advances the run and the selected upgrade appears in the HUD
answers.reward: each card reads as a juicy game reward with colored icon badges, level pips, and clear copy
answers.game_look: large touch cards, runtime text, colorful glow-backed icons, soft dim backdrop, cohesive casual pasture art
